name: Drunken Fish (Rice)
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in hot oil until tender.
2. Add beer, tomatoes, parsley, sugar, oregano, red pepper, and cumin. Bring to boil, reduce heat, cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Place fish in greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Season cavity of fish with ground pepper.
4. Stir olives into tomato sauce and pour over fish. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 45-60 minutes.
5. Remove fish to platter and keep warm.
6. Combine cornstarch and 2 tbsp cold water. In saucepan, combine pan juices and cornstarch mixture. Cook and stir until bubbly, cook 1 minute more.
7. Pass sauce with fish. Makes 6 servings.
